requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic and Grid-Profile Evidence at 230/400 V 50 Hz
requirement_topic.zh: 230/400 V 50 Hz下的电磁与电网参数证据
requirement_topic.zht: 230/400 V 50 Hz 下的電磁與電網參數證據

summary.en: Switzerland-facing inverters are typically assessed against IEC power-quality and EMC context where the 230/400 V, 50 Hz low-voltage profile is used with utility-specific settings. Even when frequency matches China, the nominal-voltage profile and project-specific harmonic, trip, and protection assumptions are part of the acceptance package.
summary.zh: 瑞士市场逆变器通常按使用IEC电磁兼容与电能质量框架评估，目标系统使用230/400 V、50 Hz低压配置并采用项目特定参数。即便与中国同为50 Hz，额定电压和谐波、跳闸、保护等项目假设也属于验收内容。
summary.zht: 瑞士市場逆變器通常按採用IEC電磁相容與電能品質框架評估，目標系統使用230/400 V、50 Hz低壓配置並採用項目特定參數。即便與中國同為50 Hz，額定電壓及諧波、跳脫、保護等項目假設也屬於驗收內容。

standards_or_laws: EN 50160 characteristics of public electricity supply

summary.en: Chinese inverters are often defaulted against China 50 Hz grid evidence in GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964, but same-frequency claims do not remove the need to map Swiss 230/400 V windows and protection assumptions for the exact model and project.
summary.zh: 中国逆变器通常围绕中国50 Hz供电进行GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基线匹配，但同频率不能取消对瑞士230/400 V电压窗口、保护定值和具体项目假设的映射。
summary.zht: 中國逆變器通常圍繞中國50 Hz供電進行GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基線匹配，但同頻率不能取消對瑞士230/400 V電壓窗口、保護定值和具體項目假設的映射。

gap.en: The gap is often project assumptions and evidence traceability. Exporters should provide Swiss settings tables, voltage/frequency and harmonic trip values, anti-islanding behavior, reconnection delays, documentation of EMC test scope, and commissioning evidence for each firmware version.
gap.zh: 差距通常在于项目假设和证据可追溯性。出口商应提供瑞士参数表、过欠压和谐波跳闸值、重连延迟、EMC测试范围说明、以及各固件版本对应的投运证据。
gap.zht: 差距通常在於項目假設和證據可追溯性。出口商應提供瑞士參數表、過欠壓和諧波跳脫值、重連延遲、EMC測試範圍說明，以及各固件版本對應的投運證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where project commissioning, utility review, or O&M requirements require proof of grid-profile and EMC settings.
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — China 50 Hz profile reports must be mapped to Swiss 230/400 V and project requirements.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Even where frequency is matched, confirm Swiss 230/400 V settings, harmonic behavior, and project-specific protection and trip logic before energisation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 即使频率匹配，也应在送电前确认瑞士230/400 V设置、谐波行为以及项目特定保护和跳闸逻辑。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 即使頻率匹配，也應在送電前確認瑞士230/400 V設置、諧波行為以及項目特定保護和跳脫邏輯。
